@graph.description: AI receptionist platform for UK businesses. Never miss a customer call again.

@graph.name: AiRingDesk
@graph.description: AI-powered virtual receptionist service for UK small businesses. Answers calls 24/7, books appointments, takes messages and transfers calls.

review.reviewBody: AiRingDesk has transformed how we handle calls. No more missed customers while we are on a job.
Set up in under 10 minutes and it just works. Aria sounds completely professional.

acceptedAnswer.text: AiRingDesk plans start from £29/month for 150 calls. All plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

mainEntity.name: Can I keep my existing phone number?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Simply divert your existing business number to your AiRingDesk number for free. Your customers call the same number as always.
Most businesses are live in under 10 minutes. Sign up, pick a UK phone number, write your AI prompt and you are ready to take calls immediately.
AiRingDesk is powered by Claude AI made by Anthropic, the same technology trusted by enterprises worldwide.

An AI receptionist is a virtual assistant that answers your business phone calls automatically 24 hours a day 7 days a week. It can take messages, book appointments, answer common questions and transfer calls to your team just like a human receptionist but at a fraction of the cost.
Yes. AiRingDesk is fully GDPR compliant. All data is stored in the UK and Europe, we are ICO registered (ZB199222), and we never share your data with third parties.
Yes. AiRingDesk can collect caller details and book appointments directly during the call. You receive instant email and SMS notifications for every appointment booked.

mainEntity.name: What happens if I miss a call?

acceptedAnswer.text: AiRingDesk answers every call automatically so you never miss one. If a call comes in while you are busy your AI receptionist answers instantly, takes the message and sends you a full transcript by email and SMS within seconds.

mainEntity.name: Does AiRingDesk work for small businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. AiRingDesk is designed specifically for UK small businesses including plumbers, dentists, solicitors, estate agents, tradespeople, clinics and many more. Plans start from just £29 per month.

mainEntity.name: Can the AI transfer calls to my team?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. AiRingDesk can transfer calls to any UK phone number. You can set up multiple departments such as sales, support and accounts and the AI will transfer callers to the right team member automatically.

mainEntity.name: What is the best AI receptionist for small businesses in the UK?

acceptedAnswer.text: AiRingDesk is the leading AI receptionist for UK small businesses, starting from just £29/month + VAT. It answers calls 24/7, books appointments, takes messages and transfers calls — all powered by Claude AI. Unlike US-focused competitors, AiRingDesk is built specifically for UK businesses with British voice recognition and UK phone numbers included.

mainEntity.name: How does an AI receptionist compare to a human receptionist?

acceptedAnswer.text: An AI receptionist like AiRingDesk answers every call instantly 24/7 at a fraction of the cost of a human receptionist. A full-time human receptionist costs £25,000+ per year in the UK. AiRingDesk starts from just £29/month + VAT — saving businesses over £24,000 per year while never missing a call.

mainEntity.name: Can AiRingDesk integrate with my CRM system?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. AiRingDesk Business plan includes CRM and webhook integration, allowing you to send call data, leads and appointments directly to your CRM system including Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho and any system with a webhook endpoint.

mainEntity.name: Does AiRingDesk work with Google Calendar?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. AiRingDesk Professional and Business plans include Google Calendar integration. When a caller books an appointment, it is added directly to your Google Calendar automatically with all caller details included.

mainEntity.name: Is there a free trial for AiRingDesk?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. AiRingDesk offers a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. You can sign up, get a UK phone number and start answering calls with your AI receptionist within 10 minutes — completely free for 14 days.

mainEntity.name: What UK phone numbers does AiRingDesk provide?

acceptedAnswer.text: AiRingDesk provides dedicated UK geographic phone numbers (01, 02 area codes) and national numbers (03). You can choose a number local to your area to give customers confidence they are calling a local business.

@graph.name: How to set up an AI receptionist for your business
@graph.description: Set up AiRingDesk AI receptionist in under 10 minutes. No technical knowledge required.

step.name: Sign up for a free trial
step.text: Visit airingdesk.com and sign up for your 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

step.name: Get your UK phone number
step.text: Choose a dedicated UK phone number for your AI receptionist, or prepare to divert your existing number.

step.name: Configure your AI receptionist
step.text: Set your business name, greeting and instructions. Tell the AI what your business does and how to handle calls.

step.name: Divert your calls
step.text: Divert your existing business number to your new AiRingDesk number. Your AI receptionist is now live.

itemListElement.name: Essential Plan
itemListElement.description: 150 calls per month. AI answering, transcripts, call transfers.

itemListElement.name: Starter Plan
itemListElement.description: 300 calls per month. Everything in Essential plus voicemail and recordings.

itemListElement.name: Professional Plan
itemListElement.description: 1000 calls per month. Appointment booking, custom AI personality, Google Calendar integration.

itemListElement.name: Business Plan
itemListElement.description: 5000 calls per month. AI voice selector, CRM integration, dedicated account manager.
